title: Caspian Ironwood
type: person
aliases: [caspian]
summary: Founder of Umbergale Labs.
---

Caspian Ironwood is the founder of Umbergale Labs. Caspian flagged churn as the top risk in the latest update.

---
title: Umbergale Labs
type: company
summary: Seed-stage company. Founded by Caspian Ironwood.
---

Umbergale Labs is a seed-stage company. Founded by Caspian Ironwood. The seed conversation started in 2025.

turns.text: Just wrapped the Umbergale Labs call with Caspian Ironwood.
Caspian said Umbergale Labs hit their growth target a month early. Ahead of plan.
Caspian is worried the Umbergale Labs pricing model undercuts their gross margin. Real concern for the round.
